heading: Hunting, pursuing, capturing, etc., in Ocala National Forest unlawful
label: 692a Hunting, pursuing, capturing, etc., in Ocala National Forest unlawful
text: When such game sanctuaries or refuges have been established as provided in , the hunting, pursuing, poisoning, killing, or capturing by trapping, netting, or any other means, or attempting to hunt, pursue, kill, or capture any game animals or birds upon the lands of the United States within the limits of such game sanctuaries or refuges shall be unlawful except under such rules and regulations as the Secretary of Agriculture may from time to time prescribe.section 692 of this title
notes: Amendments1948—Act , struck out penal provisions (see , Crimes and Criminal Procedure), and inserted reference to rules and regulations of the Secretary of Agriculture.June 25, 1948section 41 of Title 18
Effective Date of 1948 AmendmentSection 20 of act , provided that the amendment made by that act is effective .June 25, 1948Sept. 1, 1948
